full_text:
Yan Gang 嚴綱
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Gang (嚴綱). Officer of Gongsun Zan. Led Zan’s army at Jieqiao, but was killed by Qu Yi. Yan Gang was affiliated with Gongsun Zan. Yan Gang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
